prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style night street portrait of a young adult male urban character in a neon-lit Japanese city district. The subject is centered slightly right in a medium shot from waist to head, leaning toward the camera with a confident streetwear attitude, one hand in his jacket pocket and the other extended toward the viewer in a finger-gun gesture. Give him messy layered dark brown hair with detailed strands, visible ear piercings, and a deliberately obscured face covered by a plain square blur/censor block in a soft skin-tone gradient. Dress him in an all-black layered outfit: an oversized high-collar technical jacket with zippers, straps, snaps, sleeve patches, and glossy folds; a black hoodie underneath; a graphic dark T-shirt; and multiple silver chain necklaces. The background is a rainy, bustling Tokyo-like nightlife street with wet reflective pavement, metal guardrails along the sidewalk, blurred pedestrians, storefronts, streetlights, and many vertical glowing signs with indistinct Japanese-style lettering in cyan, pink, orange, yellow, and white. Use shallow depth of field with the background softly blurred, strong neon rim lighting on the character, high-contrast cel-shaded anime rendering, crisp line art, rich highlights, and a moody cyberpunk color palette. Horizontal 16:9 composition, no readable brand names, no watermark, keep the face censor block perfectly square and centered over the facial features.
